MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Apr-12-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. CARINA M. JORDON, Esq. of Suttell & Hammer, A.P.C. (Tel: 425-455-8220) for plaintiff;
Atty. JAMES A. MICHEL, Esq. (Tel: 415-239-4949) for defendant Jacqueline Chen.

HEARNG RE: DEFENDANT JACQUELINE CHEN MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT.

Matter not contested/argued. The Court adopt its tentative ruling.

Defendant's unopposed motion for set aside/vacate judgment is granted. Plaintiff filed a notice of non-opposition.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/RBU)
